sources.cleaned_content:
Q²M IRON REDEFINED

Exterior / maintenance

All surface ferrous contamination remover.

Q²M Iron REDEFINED is a fast-acting iron remover designed to decontaminate surfaces of ferrous deposits, including brake dust and rail dust. Despite its strong reaction, it maintains a neutral pH, allowing safe use on a wide range of materials while delivering efficient decontamination.

Product Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_iron_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png

Effective iron filling remover.

Q²M Iron REDEFINED simplifies the decontamination process by quickly dissolving iron contamination without harming delicate surfaces. Its refined formula improves user comfort while maintaining high effectiveness.

NO ODOUR
INSTANT ACTION
SUITABLE ON ALL SURFACES

What makes Q2M IRON REDEFINED so special?

Neutral pH for safe use on delicate materials

TECHNICAL DETAILS

Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mironredefined.webp

CAPACITIES: 500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML
PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL
Consumption: 150ml/car

HOW TO USE

01. Spray Q²M Iron REDEFINED onto a cool surface.
02. Allow the product to react with ferrous contamination.
03. Agitate lightly if needed.
04. Rinse thoroughly with water.
05. Do not allow the product to dry on the surface.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

01. What contamination does Q²M Iron REDEFINED remove?
It removes ferrous deposits such as brake and rail dust.

02. Is it safe for delicate surfaces?
Yes. The formula maintains a neutral pH.

03. Does it have a strong smell?
The redefined formula features an improved scent.

04. Can it be used on wheels and paint?
Yes. It is suitable for multiple exterior surfaces.

05. How often should iron decontamination be performed?
As needed, depending on contamination level.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q²M Iron - Brake Dust & Iron Contaminant Remover — Polished Bliss
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q²M Iron

by Gyeon

Price: £14.50

Sizes:
- 500 ml - £14.50
- 1L Redefined - £27.00
- 4 L - £83.00

Availability: Only 9 left!

Product Images:
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-iron-redefinied-all-1548x1430-2_1430x1430.webp?v=1769469436
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-iron-a_1397x1396.jpg?v=1769469514
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-iron-b_1397x1396.jpg?v=1769469539
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-iron-c_1396x1396.jpg?v=1769469558
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-iron-d_1396x1396.jpg?v=1769469588

We Say

Gyeon Q²M Iron is an intensive cleaner designed to dissolve brake dust and iron-rich fallout upon contact. Fallout bonds to exterior automotive surfaces both physically (by charge attraction) and chemically (by electrolysis), and typically contains ferrous compounds and particulates derived from industrial and commercial activities. As such contaminants gradually accumulate on bodywork, surface roughness gradually increases to the point where it can be felt, while the reflectivity of the finish and the ability of the paint to sheet water properly gradually diminishes. Furthermore, as such contaminants oxidise and corrode, caustic compounds may leach out and stain underlying surfaces. The periodic removal of such contaminants is therefore an important part of detailing, and should be performed once or twice a year.

If you're familiar with detailing clay you'll know that it's designed to remove bonded surface contaminants, but what it never says on the tin is that it often struggles to fully remove ferrous compounds and sintered iron particulates. By working chemically rather than physically, Gyeon Q²M Iron instantly reacts with ferrous compounds and sintered iron particulates and chemically reduces them to a water soluble complex that can be easily rinsed away. This process can be seen to be working with the naked eye, as the initially transparent solution gradually turns purple as it dissolves any iron particles it comes into contact with. A powerful detergent completes the process, by dissolving and lifting away residual dirt and grime. Although Gyeon Q²M Iron is pH balanced, it is a professional strength product and should therefore be used with care.

Key Features

Agitation Required: No (See How To Use)
Dilutable: No (Water:Product)
Cleaning Strength: 10/10 (Compared To Others)

Description

Gyeon Q²M Iron is one of the most efficient and fastest acting iron removers currently available, and was designed with the needs of professional detailers in mind. Formulated to dissolve brake dust and other iron-rich contamination upon contact, it is completely safe for use on all exterior surfaces (including trims and highly polished surfaces) in situations where ferrous compounds and sintered iron particulates are proving difficult to remove. Examples of such contaminants include railway dust, which can be highly resistant to all but the most aggressive clays, and iron-rich fallout, which can be hard to see but easy to feel with your fingertips.

The main ingredient in Gyeon Q²M Iron is a highly reactive neutralised acid salt. This reduces ferrous compounds and particulates into a soluble form, making them easy to rinse away with water. As a result, Gyeon Q²M Iron is less aggressive than traditional acid-based cleaners, but equally as effective in terms of cleaning power. Gyeon Q²M Iron also contains a powerful detergent, which helps to break down everyday dirt and grime when it is applied to unwashed surfaces (e.g. wheels). Its gel composition means it clings to treated surfaces with ease, extending its working time and minimising the need for agitation in all but the most extreme cases.

Specification

| Agitation Required | No |
| Chemical Basis | Acid-based (neutralised) |
| Cleaning Strength | 10 |
| Dilutable | No |
| Maximum Dwelling Time | 10 minutes |
| Removes Inorganic Contaminants | Yes |
| Removes Organic Contaminants | Yes |
| Safe For All Wheel Types | Yes |
| Strips Coatings | No |
| Strips Sealants And Waxes | Yes (partially) |
| pH | 7 (neutral) |

How To Use

Gyeon Q²M Iron comes pre-diluted to the correct strength for safe use on all exterior surfaces. In all cases, wash and rinse the surfaces you are going to treat in the normal way. Next, working on 1-2 wheels or 3-4 panels at a time, spray Gyeon Q²M Iron on liberally and allow up to 10 minutes for it to work; during this interval it will gradually turn purple as ferrous compounds and sintered iron particles dissolve into solution (this effect can be very pronounced, but don't panic because it's quite normal and to be expected).

Although Gyeon Q²M Iron is essentially a touchless cleaner, you can agitate it with either a brush (on wheels) or a microfibre towel (on bodywork and glass) if needs be. After 10 minutes or so, i.e. once the dark purple solution has started to dry (it's perfectly safe to let Gyeon Q²M Iron dry out, provided that you are working somewhere cool and out of direct sunlight), rinse the surfaces you have treated with a strong stream of water. Note that if the solution has dried fully you may need to use a stronger jet of water from a pressure washer to remove the residue.

After rinsing off, check the treated surfaces for residual contamination by running your fingertips over them while they are still wet. Contaminant-free surfaces should feel perfectly smooth (if your fingertips aren't particularly sensitive you can magnify your sense of touch by putting your fingers inside a cellophane wrapper first). If you can detect any grittiness then it's likely that the treated surfaces are still contaminated with non-ferrous particulates (e.g. paint overspray) and will need to be carefully clayed before any polishing is done or any protection is applied.

Gyeon Iron - 1000 ml

Price: $33.99

Product Images:
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Iron-1000-ml_1419_2_lw_2229.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Iron-1000-ml_1419_2_lw_2554.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Iron-1000-ml_1419_2_lw_3231.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Iron-1000-ml_1419_2_lw_4883.jpg

Available Sizes:
- 500 ml - $19.99 ($0.04/ml)
- 1000 ml - $33.99 ($0.03/ml)
- 4 L - $109.99 ($0.03/ml)

Quantity Discounts:
- 2+ units: $31.99 (6% savings)

Product Information

- Remove brake and rail dust from your paint and rims!
- Color changing formula illustrates when iron deposits can be rinsed away
- Mist, let dwell, rinse away, it is that easy!
- Safely removes stubborn iron deposits
- Product Codes: GY-0902, GY-0919, GY-0926

Customer Reviews: 86% of customers said that they would buy this item again. Based upon 14 ratings.

Product Description

Gyeon Iron will help you remove ferrous deposits such as brake dust and rail dust safe and easy! This unique formula is strong enough to remove this tough contamination, yet gentle and pH neutral. This means Gyeon Iron will make quick work of caked-on brake and rail dust, while being safe to apply on your paint, wheels, trim, glass, etc. To apply, start with a cool wet surface and simply spray this product onto the desired area, letting it dwell. After about 60 seconds you will see the formula change to a deep purple. This illustrates that the formula is reacting and removing the deposits that are on the surface or embedded in the finish! Follow up with a rinse and you are all set. What you will be left with is a clean surface, free of iron and brake dust! Remember to never let the product dry on the surface and to thoroughly rinse or wash off once finished. For any heavily soiled areas, we recommend multiple applications and/or agitating with your favorite detailing brush. Grab yourself a bottle of the Gyeon Iron, brake dust won't thank you, but your car certainly will!

Professional Detailer Reviews

I tested the Gyeon Iron product on a few different wheels as well as paint and it performed really well. It was definitely a product that impressed right away and worked really well. The wheels below of which I took pictures don't look too dirty but they had a lot of small tar and iron contamination, as expected on an Audi. For these photos I decided to show how Gyeon Iron works without any brushes and mitts, simply spraying it on the wheel, allowing it to break down the deposits, then rinsing off.
- Product Review: Gyeon Iron by Ivan Rajic

From The Label

Product Description: Efficient & powerful all surface iron contamination remover. Safe to use on paint, wheels, glass, and trim. Removes bonded iron particles easily. More power, less smell.
- No odour
- Instant action
- Safe on all surfaces

Directions: Shake well before use. Apply on a pre-washed surface. Let it work for 2-4 minutes until the product changes its colour. Rinse well. Avoid direct sunlight. Do not let it dry. May cause skin irritation. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Douglas B. on 9/24/2025 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Works great and has a pleasant smell (unless you ask my wife, but she has not smelled the Carpro Iron X). Makes decon quick and easy.

Reviewed by Jon G. on 5/9/2024 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
I used this with a DIY Detail Clay Towel and it was awesome. I didn't have to use a lot of product with that method.

Reviewed by James I. B. on 5/3/2021 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Works as advertised....used it for several years. No reason to try another product.

Product Images:
- https://carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/GYEON-Q2M-Iron-REDEFINED-500ml.webp?v=1710008239
- https://carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/GYEON-Q2M-Iron-REDEFINED-4L.webp?v=1710008239
- https://carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/GYEON-Q2M-Iron-REDEFINED-1L.webp?v=1710008239

Safe & Ph Neutral
The high reactivity of the product has not influenced its pH. All our efforts were channeled to provide a potentially broad spectrum of uses. Due to its neutral pH, which we managed to maintain, it can be safely applied on very sensitive materials or polished rims.

STRONG COLOR-CHANGING EFFECT
The strong coloring effect of a substance is a very accurate indicator of how much pollution it has accumulated and how much work awaits the product. The coloring itself, unlike other manufacturer's products, is focused solely on this function and in no way translates into the product's performance, though it serves as an illustration to users.

Decon
Decontaminating the paint is key to proper coating adhesion.

Safe on all surfaces
Safe on all exterior surfaces, including carbon ceramics.

BEST PRACTICE & PRO TIPS
Use Q²M Iron during the chemical decontamination process right before the initial wash. Always work on a cool panel and avoid direct sunlight. On hot days, work in sections and do not allow the product to dry.
TIP: Q²M Iron is extremely slippery and can be used along with a chemical-resistant clay bar as lube to speed up the process.

Description

EFFECTIVE, ALL SURFACE FERROUS CONTAMINATION REMOVER

Q²M Iron REDEFINED stands out as one of the most efficient and fast-reacting iron removers available in the market. Specially crafted to decontaminate surfaces from stubborn ferrous deposits like brake dust and rail dust, this product simplifies intensive cleansing for both enthusiasts and professional detailers.

SAFE, PH-NEUTRAL & NO UNPLEASANT ODOR: Despite its high reactivity, the product maintains a neutral pH. Our focus was on delivering a versatile solution for various applications. Additionally, thanks to its preserved neutral pH, it can be safely applied to even the most delicate materials. Notably, we've completely transformed the strong smell of the previous version, leaving you with an enjoyable Banana candy scent, making the iron decontamination process a pleasant experience.

SAFE ON ALL SURFACES: Paint, glass, plastics, PPF, wheels, rubber, chrome, metal - you name it, safe on all exterior vehicle surfaces.

SLICK, CAN BE USED AS A CLAY LUBE: Increased slickness enhances the viscosity, making it suitable for use with a clay bar, clay mitt, block, or clay towel. It will not degrade synthetic clay materials. Using GYEON Iron Redefined with your Clay Towel will make your job faster and safer.

REDEFINED: Introducing our REDEFINED line – at GYEON, we've taken our renowned chemical formulas to a whole new level. Meticulously reworked and refined, they deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and utmost ease of use. Our commitment is to provide our customers with the best user experience possible.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN: Incorporate Q²M Iron Redefined into the chemical decontamination process just before the initial wash. Always work on a cool panel and avoid direct sunlight. On hot days, tackle the task in sections and prevent the product from drying. TIP: Q²M Iron Redefined is exceptionally slippery and may be used with a chemical-resistant clay bar as a lubricant to expedite the process.

CONSUMPTION: 150ml/car
PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL

FAQ

Iron Remover or Clay?
Iron removers are not meant to replace clay barring but to complement it. Iron remover will eliminate the majority of iron contaminants, making clay barring safer. A clay bar will not pick up as much contaminants and grit, reducing the risk of scratching the paint. And yes, you can actually use Gyeon Iron as clay lube (use Gyeon's mild or coarse clay only, these clay bars are chemical resistant).

Great for cracks and crevices
Iron remover is also excellent for decontaminating hard-to-reach areas, cracks, and crevices. It's a must for removing iron from complex areas such as wheels, rotors, brake calipers, etc.

Where can I spray this on?
You can use Gyeon Iron on all exterior surfaces: PPF, plastics, glass, rubber trims, wheels, aluminum, painted surfaces, and metal surfaces.

Anything I should be aware of?
Always use Gyeon Iron on cool surfaces. The reason is, you don't want the product to evaporate before it can chemically react with the iron fillings to bleed them off. And you don't want the 'purple' to dry on the surface. It does have a 'funky' smell, but don't worry, it's not toxic.

Key Features:
- Removes iron particles from brake dust and industrial fallout without damage.
- Protects surfaces from rust, pitting, and damage caused by ferrous particles.
- Color-changing formula shows where it's working.

Specifications

| SKU(s) | GY-IRON-MAIN, GY-0902, GY-0919 |
| Product Form | Liquid |
| Applicable Finishes | Paintwork, Wheels, Glass, Chrome, Plastic Trims |

Why Buy?

GYEON Q2M Iron Remover makes fast work of iron removal during the decontamination process. This easy to use and safe formula works hard to remove nasty ferrous particles from brake dust, rail dust, and other industrial fallout without damaging delicate automotive surfaces. GYEON Q2M Iron Remover chemically removes iron particles so they are no longer a threat to your vehicle's finish.

How to Use

Always work out of direct sunlight, on a surface that is cool to the touch.
- Thoroughly wash the surfaces being treated.
- Spray a liberal amount of GYEON Q2M Iron onto the surface and allow to dwell for several minutes. DO NOT ALLOW IT TO DRY ON THE SURFACE.
- For heavily soiled areas agitate with a damp sponge, microfiber towel, or appropriate brush.
- Rinse well.
- Follow with detailing clay to ensure that any non-ferrous contaminants have also been removed from the surface.

Product Description

Remove ferrous particles from wheels and paint with less effort!

GYEON Q2M Iron Remover makes fast work of iron removal during the decontamination process. This easy to use and safe formula works hard to remove nasty ferrous particles from brake dust, rail dust, and other industrial fallout without damaging delicate automotive surfaces. GYEON Q2M Iron Remover chemically removes iron particles so they are no longer a threat to your vehicle's finish.

Iron. It's everywhere, even inside your body, but when it flakes off of brake components and embeds itself in wheels, or worse, in paint, it can cause rust, pitting, and other irreversible damage. GYEON Q2M Iron Remover helps eliminate the risk that ferrous particles cause to the finishes of our vehicle by actively dissolving away the threat.

GYEON Q2M Iron Remover has a neutral pH, making it safe for use on all types of rims, glass, and even clear coat. The color-changing formula reacts with iron particles on contact so you can actually see it working. GYEON Q2M Iron Remover makes the decontamination process faster and easier, so you can move on to polishing, and then coating your vehicle!

Directions:
Always work out of direct sunlight, on a surface that is cool to the touch.
- Thoroughly wash the surfaces being treated.
- Spray a liberal amount of GYEON Q2M Iron onto the surface and allow to dwell for several minutes. DO NOT ALLOW IT TO DRY ON THE SURFACE.
- For heavily soiled areas agitate with a damp sponge, microfiber towel, or appropriate brush.
- Rinse well.
- Follow with detailing clay to ensure that any non-ferrous contaminants have also been removed from the surface.

Proposition 65 Warning for California Consumers

Video: Q²M Iron #GYEONArchive (YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-9AoPyL9bLc)

sources.cleaned_content:
Q²M Iron - 1000ml

Brand: GYEON
Art. nr. GYIRO10
Rating: 4.6 (68 reviews)

Price: € 32.99
Availability: In stock

Product Images:
- https://cdn.qso.eu/media/09/3e/f9/1758871318/GYEON_IRON_1000-pixelcut.png
- https://cdn.qso.eu/media/18/75/bf/1760513043/DSC02857.jpg
- https://cdn.qso.eu/media/7c/4a/b2/1760513043/DSC02844.jpg
- https://cdn.qso.eu/media/d0/36/d7/1760513043/DSC02853.jpg

Volumes available: 500ml, 1000ml, 4000ml

Bullet Points:
- Zeer effectieve ijzerverwijderaar
- Perfect voor velgen
- pH neutraal
- Kleurt paars

Description

Effectively remove iron
Q²M Iron is one of the most powerful and fastest-working products for removing iron particles, industrial fallout, and brake dust. The advanced formula makes cleaning easier and delivers faster results for both enthusiasts and professionals.

Safe for paint, wheels, and glass
Use Q²M Iron on paint, wheels, trim, and glass. Thanks to its pH-neutral composition, it's completely safe for all surfaces — even coated cars. It loosens even the most stubborn brake dust or deeply embedded grime.

During use, Q²M Iron changes color: the liquid turns purple as it reacts with iron particles, showing exactly where it's working. The updated formula also has a milder scent, making it more pleasant to use.

Tip: Use Q²M Iron as part of your regular paint decontamination process, before claying or applying a protective layer. Always work on a cool surface and rinse thoroughly for the best results.

With Q²M Iron, you'll remove contamination that regular washing can't touch — for a visibly cleaner and smoother finish.

Specifications

| Product number | GYIRO10 |
| Consistency | Liquid |

Hazard Information

H302: Harmful if swallowed.
H317: May cause an allergic skin reaction.

Manual

- Cool surface – Use in the shade, not on hot panels.
- Spray – Apply generously to paint, wheels, or glass.
- Wait – Let it work for 1–2 minutes. The liquid will turn purple.
- Optional brushing – Use a brush or cloth for stubborn dirt.
- Rinse – Rinse thoroughly with water. Done!

FAQ

Waarvoor gebruik ik Q²M Iron?
Q²M Iron verwijdert vliegroest, remstof, spoorstaal en andere ijzerhoudende vervuiling van lak, velgen, glas en sierlijsten. Perfect als dieptereiniging vóór een wax, sealant of coating.

Hoe lang moet ik het in laten werken?
Laat het 1 tot 2 minuten inwerken. Belangrijk: laat het niet opdrogen, anders kunnen vlekken ontstaan.

Is het veilig voor mijn lak en coatings?
Ja! De formule is pH-neutraal, dus veilig voor alle lakken, velgen, glas én zelfs keramische coatings.

Waarom wordt het product paars tijdens gebruik?
De paarse kleur ontstaat wanneer het product reageert met ijzerdeeltjes. Zo zie je precies waar Q²M Iron werkt.

Kan ik het gebruiken in direct zonlicht of op warme panelen?
Nee, altijd op een koel oppervlak en uit de zon gebruiken. Dit voorkomt opdrogen en strepen.

Moet ik iets gebruiken om te boenen of is spray-en-spoel genoeg?
In de meeste gevallen is spray-en-spoel voldoende. Bij hardnekkige vervuiling kun je een zachte microvezeldoek of kwast gebruiken.

Reviews

Goed Gyeon product
Ik heb deze velgenreiniger gebruikt voor het reinigen van mijn lichtmetalen velgen die flink vervuild waren met remstof en vuil. De werking was direct zichtbaar — na insprayen, even inwerken en afspoelen verdwenen veel vuil­ophopingen en voelde de velg stukken schoner.
S - 10/11/2025

Top spul
Super spul, vliegroest vliegt weg, doet wat het moet doen, wel prijzig, maar het hoeft niet iedere week.
Evr - 27/09/2025

Goed spul
Werkt echt goed, maar is ook snel op en daarom wel duurder in gebruik en daarom 4 sterren.
Remco - 19/07/2025

Additional Product Info

Removes even stubborn dirt
Q²M Iron dissolves industrial fallout, brake dust, and rail particles quickly and effectively. Even deeply embedded contamination is visibly removed, leaving your paint, wheels, and glass looking clean and smooth.

pH-neutral and coating-friendly
Use Q²M Iron worry-free on paint, glass, wheels, and trim. The pH-neutral formula is gentle on surfaces and safe for ceramic coatings.

Color change shows it's working
During use, Q²M Iron turns purple as it reacts with iron particles. This way, you can see exactly where the product is working – fast, effective, and without any guesswork.
